shared_properties: Overlay canvas stays 200x120px so it fits within the 320x180 internal frame without touching screen edges.
Text styling aligns to the 8px HUD font scale used by the timer glyph atlas.
Panel treatment remains low-saturation and semi-transparent so gameplay context is still visible underneath.
differences: Panel includes title and menu labels for PAUSED, CONTINUE, RESTART, and QUIT within one centered composition.
Border corners use brighter stone accents to separate the pause state from the darker gameplay field.
Interior fill uses a restrained alpha-ready pattern rather than a fully opaque slab.

context.usage: Centered pause-state overlay triggered by ESC during active play.

shape.silhouette: Centered rectangular panel with inner frame and menu text blocks.
shape.collision_read: UI-only asset with no collision meaning.

acceptance_criteria: All four menu labels sit on an 8px baseline grid and remain readable at 1x scale.
Panel opacity treatment allows dark gameplay silhouettes to remain visible behind the overlay.

reference_images.label: slip_down_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds HUD contrast, muted dungeon palette, and low-saturation screen overlays for the active widget.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: ImageBundle for the panel with child UI text or atlas-driven labels anchored inside the frame.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load through AssetServer during the Loading state and keep the overlay handle in a pause UI resource.
runtime_notes: Use Bevy 0.13 with ImagePlugin::default_nearest() so every asset stays pixel-perfect at 4x upscale.
Toggle visibility for pause entry instead of spawning and despawning the panel every time.
Keep the panel anchored to the centered 200x120 safe area to preserve deterministic layout.
